'''Bravo Squadron''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] military unit during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They were led by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] into the [[Battle of Thule|Battle of Sivvi]].
